events.event_title: Epstein Sexually Abused Victim-1 at 9 East 71st St, New York (2002-2005)
events.description: Epstein sexually abused Victim-1 on multiple occasions at his 9 East 71st Street New York residence between approximately 2002 and 2005, when Victim-1 was under 18.; Epstein sexually abused numerous minor victims ages as young as 14 at his Manhattan residence, 9 East 71st Street, with victims escorted to a massage room where Epstein escalated physical contact to include sex acts.
events.nexus_reasoning: Epstein directly and personally sexually abused Victim-1 at his New York residence, as stated in the FBI affidavit.

evidence.excerpt: Between approximately 2002 and 2005, EPSTEIN sexually abused Victim-1 on multiple occasions in the Subject Premises. This sexual abuse all occurred when Victim-1 was under the age of 18.

from at least in or about 2002, up to and including at least in or about 2005, EPSTEIN sexually abused numerous minor victims at the Subject Premises. In particular, and as alleged in the Indictment, when a victim arrived at the Subject Premises, she would be escorted to a room inside the Subject Premises with a massage table, where she would perform a massage on EPSTEIN.

events.event_title: Leon Black Raped Victim at Epstein's Manhattan Townhouse, 2001-2002
events.description: Leon Black raped a victim at Epstein's Manhattan townhouse around 2001-2002, with the victim describing excruciating pain while on a massage table at 9 East 71st Street.; A 16-year-old minor sent to give Leon Black a massage at Epstein's townhouse was violently raped by Black; after bleeding rectally, Epstein's associates flew her out of New York the next day instead of seeking medical care.; Victim was driven to Epstein's Manhattan townhouse to be introduced to Leon Black; after the assault, the victim spent the next few years in Palm Beach, Florida or the U.S. Virgin Islands.
events.nexus_reasoning: The rape occurred at Epstein's own Manhattan townhouse (9 East 71st Street) where the victim was brought to give massages to Epstein and Black.

evidence.excerpt:
Victim said Black raped her around 20 years ago (2001 or 2002) in Epstein's townhouse
• Victim described it, felt pain (like insertion of something sharp in her vagina), on massage table with head on floor and legs on his shoulders; excruciating

Minor victim, at Epstein's townhouse and was told to give Leon Black a massage, violently raped by black
• 16 years old when raped by Black

• Black used adult sex toys in victim's rectum and vagina. Victim felt severe pinching in her vagina and began bleeding from her rectum; Black and others at Epstein's house would not take her to the doctor and instead flew her out of NY the next day

next few years was in Palm Beach or US Virgin Islands

• Driven from. to Epstein's townhouse to meet Epstein's special friend named Leon Black; brought to Manhattan townhouse

events.event_title: 14-Year-Old Victim Travels to Epstein's Manhattan Mansion with Epstein and Maxwell
events.nexus_reasoning: Epstein physically present and directly abused the minor victim during repeated NYC trips.

evidence.excerpt: Beginning when was approximately 14, she began to travel with Epstein and Maxwell to New York City on occasion. During what believes was an early trip, she stayed at Epstein's mansion, and Maxwell and Epstein took her shopping.
Epstein periodically flew to New York, where she would stay with him (and sometimes Maxwell) at his house in Manhattan. recalls that Epstein sexually abused her during the trips to New York
In the summer of a few months before she turned 18, moved to New York City. She maintained contact with Epstein during that year in New York, and he continued to abuse her at his New York townhome.

evidence.excerpt: 27 electronic devices seized on August 12, 2019 from Little Saint James in the Virgin Islands. The Subject Devices were all recovered from a search of a private island in the U.S. Virgin Islands, known as Little Saint James, approximately 75 acres, located four miles off the southeast coast of St. Thomas Island. Multiple structures including a main residence, pool house, sheds, beach house, office, and cabanas.

events.event_title: Victim and Mother First Visit Epstein's Palm Beach House for Tea
events.description: Minor victim and her mother visited Epstein's Palm Beach house and had tea with Epstein by his pool after being invited by Epstein's office; Epstein told them he mentored young talented individuals.; Minor victim regularly spent time at Epstein's Palm Beach house from ages 14 to 17; Epstein gave her $200-300 in cash per visit and Maxwell and Epstein groomed her for sexual abuse.; Juan Alessi, Epstein's house manager, was directed by Epstein and Maxwell to pick up the minor victim from her home and drive her to Epstein's Palm Beach house; he also drove Epstein, Maxwell, and the victim to the movies.
events.nexus_reasoning: Epstein was physically present at his Palm Beach house during the visit and personally spoke with the victim and her mother.

evidence.excerpt: Several weeks later, when was home from camp, she recalls someone from Epstein's office calling her house and inviting her to come to Epstein's house in Palm Beach for tea. and her mother went to the house, where they had tea with Epstein by his pool.

subsequently began regularly spending time at Epstein's house in Palm Beach, beginning at age 14, and continuing until she was 17, when she relocated to New York City. During those visits, Epstein regularly gave her $200-300 in cash

Alessi remembers being sent by both Epstein and Maxwell to pick up from her house and drive her to Epstein's house, and he recalls the specific neighborhood where she lived. He recalls Maxwell and Epstein spending time with at the Palm Beach house, and he also remembers being sent to buy movie tickets, and driving Maxwell, and Epstein to the movies.

In approximately 1993, Maxwell began coming to the house in Palm Beach, and became in charge of the whole house. Epstein told Alessi to go to Maxwell for his orders, and he began taking directions from Maxwell about house operations.

evidence.excerpt: also recalls traveling to Epstein's ranch in New Mexico with Epstein and Maxwell. She has few specific memories from these trips, and does not recall whether Epstein abused her at that location.

events.event_title: Epstein Staff Book Two Associates on AA 1592 JFK to St. Thomas, May 23–27, 2017
events.description: Epstein's American Express Centurion Travel booked two unnamed associates round-trip on AA flights from JFK to St. Thomas (USVI) May 23-27, 2017 for $1738.38, likely traveling to Little St. James Island.
events.nexus_reasoning: Travel to St. Thomas arranged through Epstein's Centurion Travel account for two unnamed associates in May 2017, consistent with trafficking-related travel patterns.

evidence.excerpt:
Morning. I need round trip coach tickets for [redacted] and [redacted] from NY to STT on Tuesday May 23 direct flight return on Sat May 27 direct flight.
1 AA 1592 23MAY JFK STT 0805A 0330P
2 AA 936 27MAY STT JFK 0210P 0627P
TOTAL FARE - USD 1738.38

events.event_title: Associate Flies Paris to Newark, Then Private with Epstein to St. Thomas — June 17, 2017
events.description: Lesley Groff arranged for a female associate to fly commercial Paris to Newark on June 17, 2017, then join Jeffrey Epstein on a private flight from Newark to St. Thomas, U.S. Virgin Islands.
events.nexus_reasoning: Jeffrey Epstein personally flew with the associate on his private aircraft from Newark to St. Thomas, as directed by his assistant Lesley Groff.

evidence.excerpt: Morning natasha! We now need to fly from Paris to Newark this sat June 17. It must be a Newark flight then fly private with Jeffrey to St Thomas.

events.event_title: Lesley Groff Books Epstein Associate for Flight to Stockholm, June 7, 2017
events.description: Lesley Groff arranged through American Express Centurion Travel for a female associate to fly to Stockholm, Sweden on June 7, 2017, with a return in August; Norwegian Air flight considered at ~$2500 per person.
events.nexus_reasoning: Travel arranged by Epstein's personal assistant Lesley Groff via his American Express Centurion Travel account for an unnamed female associate.

evidence.excerpt: Hi Natasha...I spoke to a colleague today re a trip to Stockholm for [redacted] and put a Norwegian Air flight on hold for June 8th. [Redacted] has informed me she must go home on June 7th... please, lets look at some connecting flights that are lower priced..she needs to return in August

events.event_title: Brad Karp and Kathy Ruemmler Meet at Epstein Event in New York, May 19, 2017
events.description: Lesley Groff informed associates that Brad Karp (attorney) would join Kathryn Ruemmler's meeting at 5:30pm on May 19, 2017, before leaving for a dinner in midtown Manhattan at 6:45pm.
events.nexus_reasoning: Brad Karp and Kathryn Ruemmler are attorneys linked to Epstein's legal team, meeting coordinated by Epstein's personal assistant Lesley Groff.

evidence.excerpt: Brad Karp will join the Kathy Ruemmler meeting tomorrow at 5:30pm he says he can stay for about an hour but must leave to introduce someone at a dinner in midtown at 6:45pm...
